name: Midas Basis Trading Token
redeem: Exit is via Midas redemption vaults or secondary liquidity where available. Midas contracts support instant onchain redemption when liquidity, limits, and minimums allow, or request-based redemption where an admin fulfills after offchain processing; token/vault access can be affected by blacklist, greenlist, sanctions, and pause controls.
notes: Dollar-denominated ERC-20 tied to a delta-neutral basis trading strategy. Collateral review should account for managed/offchain strategy risk, permissioned mint/burn, upgradeability, manual price feeds, and admin controls.
